description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant red background, prominently featuring the iconic Coca-Cola logo in bold white script wrapping around its surface. The can is decorated with realistic water droplets and dynamic white and gold swooshes, giving it a cold, refreshing appearance. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. One side of the can shows a visible dent, indicating some physical damage to the container. The surface is glossy and reflective, with the branding and design elements clearly printed. The can is typical of those found in urban environments, such as streets, parks, or vending machines.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white script, metallic top, and visible water droplets, featuring a noticeable dent on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full Coca-Cola logo, water droplets, and the metallic pull-tab top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a large dent and distortion in the can's surface, with partial logo and design visible.
description_view_2: Angled view similar to the front, showing the logo, water droplets, and a hint of the dented area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the dented area, with less of the logo visible and more of the red and white design.
attribute_brand_logo: The Coca-Cola logo is prominently displayed in white cursive script wrapping around the can's red surface, occupying the central and most visible area.
attribute_flavor_indication: The red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate the classic cola flavor.
